description_long: This object is a modern double-action revolver with a robust, matte black finish and a solid, ergonomic grip. The frame is constructed from metal, featuring a prominent, vented barrel shroud and a top-mounted accessory rail for optics or attachments. The cylinder is thick and well-machined, with visible fluting and a polished metallic sheen, contrasting with the darker body. The trigger guard is rounded and substantial, providing ample space for gloved fingers, while the trigger itself is smooth and metallic. The grip is contoured with finger grooves, designed for comfort and control, and appears to be made of a textured polymer or rubber. The overall design is tactical and utilitarian, with minimal decorative markings and a focus on functionality.
description: A modern, matte black double-action revolver with a vented barrel shroud, ergonomic textured grip, and a top accessory rail. The design is robust and tactical, with a polished cylinder and minimal markings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the revolver, including the vented barrel shroud, accessory rail, and contoured grip.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel opening, front sight, and the width of the cylinder and frame.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the cylinder release, trigger, and the ergonomic grip contours.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the backstrap of the grip, hammer, and the alignment of the sights.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is contoured with pronounced finger grooves for ergonomic handling, featuring a matte black, slightly textured surface that appears to be made of polymer or rubber. Its shape is rounded and tapers slightly toward the base, providing a secure hold. The surface pattern is subtle, likely stippled or lightly pebbled, enhancing grip without aggressive checkering. There are no visible logos or embellishments, emphasizing a utilitarian design. The backstrap is smooth and integrated seamlessly with the rest of the grip.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is robust and rounded, with a thick profile that offers ample space for finger placement. It is smoothly contoured without sharp edges or undercuts, and there are no visible texturing or reinforcement features. The design is functional and standard, lacking any integrated accessories or distinctive styling elements.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is medium-length with a vented shroud along the top, giving it a tactical appearance. The profile is solid and slightly squared, with no visible threading or compensator at the muzzle. The exterior finish is matte black, matching the rest of the frame, and there are no visible markings or fluting on the barrel itself.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the slide or barrel exterior. The design is clean and unadorned, with a focus on functionality rather than decorative elements.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: As a revolver, this object does not have a traditional magazine base or floorplate. The grip base is rounded and smooth, with no extensions, flares, or finger rests, and lacks any visible logos or texturing.
